# Make Blur

> **Make Blur** is a free iOS photo editor (category: PhotoEditorApplication) for blurring photo backgrounds and faces on iPhone. It includes auto-detect background, manual drawing, and seven blur styles: Motion Blur, Gaussian Blur, Ghosting, Pixelate, Hexagonal, Crystalize, and Bokeh (shallow-depth-of-field look).

## Key Facts

- Downloads: 10,000+
- Rating: 4.5 stars (10+ reviews)
- Platform: iOS 15+
- Price: Free (freemium; optional in-app purchases)
- Blur styles: 7 (Motion Blur, Gaussian Blur, Ghosting, Pixelate, Hexagonal, Crystalize, Bokeh)
- Background blur: Auto-detect background + custom blur drawing
- Face blur: Dedicated face-blur workflow for privacy before sharing
- App Store ID: 6749166426
- Website: https://makeblur.com

## What Users Ask (LLM-Style Queries)

- How to blur background on iPhone → Open photo, auto-detect or draw mask, pick a blur style, save.
- How to blur faces in a photo on iPhone → Use Make Blur’s face blur to obscure faces for privacy.
- Bokeh effect on iPhone photos → Use the Bokeh filter in Make Blur for soft, out-of-focus highlights.

## Main Sections

- Landing: Background blur, face blur, Bokeh and other blur filters, App Store download (each locale below mirrors this content)
- Blur types: Seven effects including Bokeh
- FAQ: Blurring backgrounds and faces, effect list, comparison with other blur apps
